name: BEML Limited
summary: BEML Limited provides products and services to the mining and construction, rail and metro, and defense and aerospace sectors in India. The company offers mining machinery for opencast and underground mines; dozers, excavators, backhoe loaders, front end loaders, and motor graders; hydraulic pumps and cylinders, hydro-pneumatic suspensions, and control valves; transmission, axle, and bevel gear powerline systems; diesel engines and generator sets; backhoe dredgers and dredger spares; and dump trucks, shovels, pipe layers, tire handlers, and water sprinklers. It also provides passenger coaches, electrical multiple units, inspection cars, track laying equipment, rail buses, spoil disposal units, treasury vans, mil rail coaches, wagons, utility track vehicle, and metro cars. In addition, the company offers armored recovery and repair vehicles, engineering mine ploughs, and surface mine clearance systems; BMP transmission and final drives, BMP refurbishing products, assembly hydrogas suspension units, and transmission products; wagons and milrail coaches, and ejectors and air cleaners; and aircraft towing tractors, ground handling and ground support equipment, crash fire tenders, aircraft weapon loaders, jigs and fixtures, and gears. Further, it provides mobility vehicles, all-terrain vehicles, command post vehicles, pinaka launchers, pontoon bridge systems, sarvatra bridge systems, heavy recovery vehicles, and trailers, as well as snow cutters and aircraft weapon loading trolleys. The company also exports its products to approximately 68 countries worldwide. The company was formerly known as Bharat Earth Movers Limited. BEML Limited was founded in 1964 and is based in Bengaluru, India.
